steps.title: Name the relationship
steps.content: The first sentence describes post-consumer waste, which becomes waste after reaching the consumer. The next sentence describes pre-consumer waste, which becomes waste before reaching the consumer. The transition must signal contrast between these opposite categories.

steps.title: Check the transition logic
steps.content: Choice B would introduce an example, but pre-consumer waste is not an example of post-consumer waste. Choice C would show a result, and Choice D would add a specific detail. The remaining transition correctly signals opposition. The answer is A.
